configuration.aws.credentials.descriptio:
Variables used to configure AWS credentials.

Example: to set the AWS region and profile, add items with keys `AWS_REGION` and `AWS_PROFILE`.
configuration.aws.inferenceProfileRegion:
Override the inference profile region for AWS services.

By default, the inference profile region is derived from `AWS_REGION` (e.g., 'us-east-1' -> 'us'). Use this setting to explicitly specify a different region.

Examples: 'global', 'us', 'eu', 'apac'.
configuration.snowflake.credentials.desc:
Variables used to configure Snowflake Cortex provider.

Example: to set the Snowflake account and connections path, add items with keys `SNOWFLAKE_ACCOUNT` and `SNOWFLAKE_HOME`.
configuration.snowflake.customHeaders.de: Extra HTTP headers attached to every Snowflake Cortex request. Useful for enterprise gateways that require tenancy or routing headers. Entries may override internal headers and break the connection.
configuration.anthropic.baseUrl.descript: Custom Anthropic API base URL. Overrides the default https://api.anthropic.com/v1 endpoint. Also set automatically from the ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL environment variable.
configuration.anthropic.customHeaders.de: Extra HTTP headers attached to every Anthropic request. Useful for enterprise gateways that require tenancy or routing headers. Entries may override internal headers and break the connection.
configuration.foundry.customHeaders.desc: Extra HTTP headers attached to every Microsoft Foundry request. Useful for enterprise gateways that require tenancy or routing headers. Entries may override internal headers and break the connection.
configuration.openai-api.baseUrl.descrip: Custom OpenAI API base URL. Overrides the default https://api.openai.com/v1 endpoint. Also set automatically from the OPENAI_BASE_URL environment variable.
configuration.openai-api.customHeaders.d: Extra HTTP headers attached to every OpenAI request. Useful for enterprise gateways that require tenancy or routing headers. Entries may override internal headers and break the connection.
configuration.google.baseUrl.description: Custom Gemini API base URL. Overrides the default https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta endpoint. Also set automatically from the GEMINI_BASE_URL environment variable.
configuration.google.customHeaders.descr: Extra HTTP headers attached to every Gemini request. Useful for enterprise gateways that require tenancy or routing headers. Entries may override internal headers and break the connection.
Base URL for the custom OpenAI-compatible provider endpoint.
configuration.openai-compatible.customHe: Extra HTTP headers attached to every OpenAI-compatible request. Useful for enterprise gateways that require tenancy or routing headers. Entries may override internal headers and break the connection.
commands.configureProviders.title: Configure Language Model Providers
